user.title: Ollama Monitor Setup
user.description: Enter the URL of your running Ollama Monitor instance. The monitor exposes a REST API that this integration polls for GPU and Ollama status data.

data_description.monitor_url: The base URL of the Ollama Monitor, e.g. `http://192.168.1.10:3000`

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Ollama Monitor. Check the URL and make sure the monitor is running.
error.invalid_url: Invalid URL format. Use the form `http://<host>:3000`

abort.already_configured: This Ollama Monitor instance is already configured.
